description: A horizontal graphic on a dark navy background with a faint Department of Homeland Security seal watermark. The DHS seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the upper left. Bold white text reads NEWS RELEASE, with an italic serif headline below reading DHS Terminates 2021 Designation of Venezuela for Temporary Protected Status.
notable_text: NEWS RELEASE; DHS Terminates 2021 Designation of Venezuela for Temporary Protected Status
